emergency_definition: Active water discharge from a sprinkler head
Flooding inside a building from a pipe failure

non_emergency_routing_rules.message_to_caller: I'll call back next business day.

call_transfer_rules.pre_transfer_message: We'll have someone contact you shortly.
call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: I was unable to reach a technician directly. I've left an urgent message and Kevin will call you back within 30 minutes. Please stay available.

after_hours_flow_summary: Collect name, callback number, and one sentence about the issue. Tell them I'll call back next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Try my cell first — 312-555-0182. If I don't answer in 30 seconds, try Dave at 312-555-0349. If Dave doesn't answer in 30 seconds, leave a voicemail on my cell and tell the caller I'll call back within 30 minutes.
